'''mazhana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placozoon|placozoon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placozoon|placozoon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mazhana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzhænæth|mæzhænæth]] || [[word:mæzhænæj|mæzhænæj]] || [[word:mæzhænæsh|mæzhænæsh]] || [[word:mæzhænæ|mæzhænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazhazhanath|mazhazhanath]] || [[word:mazhazhanaj|mazhazhanaj]] || [[word:mazhazhanash|mazhazhanash]] || [[word:mazhazhana|mazhazhana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazhanath|mazhanath]] || [[word:mazhanaj|mazhanaj]] || [[word:mazhanash|mazhanash]] || [[word:mazhana|mazhana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazhafnath|mazhafnath]] || [[word:mazhafnaj|mazhafnaj]] || [[word:mazhafnash|mazhafnash]] || [[word:mazhafnaf|mazhafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazhanatha|mazhanatha]] || [[word:mazhanaja|mazhanaja]] || [[word:mazhanasha|mazhanasha]] || [[word:mazhanaka|mazhanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazhanath|mazhanath]] || [[word:mazhanaj|mazhanaj]] || [[word:mazhanash|mazhanash]] || [[word:mazhana|mazhana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazhanathal|mazhanathal]] || [[word:mazhanajal|mazhanajal]] || [[word:mazhanashal|mazhanashal]] || [[word:mazhanakal|mazhanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazhanathatha|mazhanathatha]] || [[word:mazhanajaja|mazhanajaja]] || [[word:mazhanashasha|mazhanashasha]] || [[word:mazhanaka|mazhanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazhanathan|mazhanathan]] || [[word:mazhanajan|mazhanajan]] || [[word:mazhanashan|mazhanashan]] || [[word:mazhanakan|mazhanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazhanathaoro|mazhanathaoro]] || [[word:mazhanajaoro|mazhanajaoro]] || [[word:mazhanashaoro|mazhanashaoro]] || [[word:mazhanakaoro|mazhanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
